citation_label: Revenu Quebec Schedule M 2025 - Interest Paid on a Student Loan
heading: Revenu Quebec Schedule M 2025 - Interest Paid on a Student Loan
body:
Title: Revenu Quebec Schedule M 2025 interest paid on a student loan.

Source:
- https://www.revenuquebec.ca/en/online-services/forms-and-publications/current-details/tp-1-v/
- https://www.revenuquebec.ca/documents/en/formulaires/tp/2025-12/TP-1.D.M-V%282025-12%29.pdf

Schedule M line relationships encoded from the official schedule:
Line 46 enters the unused portion of interest paid on a student loan from line 62 of Schedule M for 2024 or the amount shown on the taxpayer's 2024 notice of assessment. Line 48 enters interest paid in 2025 on a student loan. Line 52 adds lines 46 and 48, and all or part of line 52 may be carried to TP-1 line 385. Line 60 enters the amount carried to line 385 of the 2025 return. Line 62 subtracts line 60 from line 52 and gives the amount that can be carried forward to a future year. The form also instructs taxpayers who paid interest after 1997 but did not calculate a 2024 carryforward to enter on line 46 interest paid for 1998 through 2024 minus interest already used for previous student-loan-interest credits.

metadata.title: Revenu Quebec Schedule M 2025 - Interest Paid on a Student Loan
